# Beorn's Welcome

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

![[305152.png]]

*Boon.*

---

Play only if you control a **_Beorning_** hero. Attach to a hero. Limit 1 per hero.
**Response**: After you spend any resources from attached hero’s pool for a purpose other than paying to play a card, exhaust Beorn’s Welcome to add 1 resource to attached hero’s pool.
